desc: A scrawny, reptilian creature barely three feet tall crouches in the shadows. Its dull scales are caked with mine dust, and it clutches a crude shiv fashioned from a broken pickaxe head. Beady yellow eyes dart nervously between the exits.

A scrawny, reptilian creature barely three feet tall crouches in the shadows. Its dull scales are caked with mine dust, and it clutches a crude shiv fashioned from a broken pickaxe head. Beady yellow eyes dart nervously between the exits.

A squat but powerfully built kobold wearing a crude crown of copper wire and rat bones. Its eyes gleam with cunning malice, and it grips a notched short sword in one clawed hand. Scars crisscross its scaled hide — this one has survived where others fell.
